creator: freebsd@ihead.ru
text:
2 drives: KINGSTON SKC400S371T
Size: 1TB
Used: 403G
Inodes: 10M

It took about 90 minutes to complete 
fsk_ufs -E /home

Phases 1-4 took about 5 minutes.
Phase 5 - rest time.

According to "systat -vmstat" on both drives:
tps mainly 111
MB/s from 0.5 to 2000
%busy - 98-99%

Not good results.
